filler_pool.turn: Search for laptop reviews for software development and visit a detailed comparison page.

state_item.title: Best Laptops for Developers 2026
state_item.content: Top picks: 1) MacBook Pro M4 Pro ($2,499) - 18-hour battery, best in class build quality. 2) ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 13 ($1,899) - best keyboard, Linux compatible. 3) Framework 16 ($1,699) - most repairable, modular design. 4) Dell XPS 15 ($2,199) - great display, compact. 5) ASUS Zenbook 14 ($1,299) - best value. All tested with compilation benchmarks, Docker performance, and multi-monitor setups.

filler_pool.turn: Search for GPU benchmarks for machine learning and visit the comparison chart.

state_item.title: GPU Training Benchmarks 2026
state_item.content: Training throughput comparison (images/sec on ResNet-50): RTX 5090 (1,245), RTX 5080 (890), RTX 4090 (780), A100 80GB (650), H100 (1,100), H200 (1,450), MI300X (1,280). Memory: H200 (141GB HBM3e), MI300X (192GB HBM3), RTX 5090 (32GB GDDR7). Price-performance leader: RTX 5080 at $1,199.

filler_pool.turn: Search for standing desk reviews and compare the top 5 options.

state_item.title: The 5 Best Standing Desks of 2026
state_item.content: After testing 23 standing desks for 200+ hours: 1) Uplift V3 ($699) - best overall, 355-lb capacity, quietest motor. 2) FlexiSpot E7 Pro ($549) - best value, solid build. 3) Fully Jarvis ($589) - best for small spaces. 4) IKEA BEKANT ($499) - budget pick, decent quality. 5) Herman Miller Nevi ($1,195) - premium pick. Key factors: motor noise, wobble at max height, warranty, and cable management.

filler_pool.turn: Search for wireless noise-canceling headphones and visit the top review.

state_item.title: Best Noise-Cancelling Headphones 2026
state_item.content: Ranked by overall score: 1) Sony WH-1000XM6 (8.7/10) - best ANC, 40hr battery. 2) Bose QC Ultra (8.5/10) - most comfortable, best call quality. 3) Apple AirPods Max 2 (8.3/10) - best for Apple ecosystem. 4) Sennheiser Momentum 5 (8.2/10) - best sound quality. 5) JBL Tour One M3 (7.9/10) - best value at $249. Tested: ANC effectiveness, sound signature, comfort, latency, and multi-device support.

filler_pool.turn: Look up cloud hosting providers and compare pricing for a small web application.

state_item.title: Cloud Hosting Cost Comparison 2026
state_item.content: Monthly cost for 2 vCPU, 4GB RAM, 50GB SSD: AWS EC2 t3.medium ($30.37), Google Cloud e2-medium ($26.76), Azure B2s ($30.37), DigitalOcean Premium ($28), Hetzner CPX21 ($8.39), Vultr ($24). With managed database: AWS RDS ($45/mo), GCP Cloud SQL ($42/mo), PlanetScale ($39/mo, serverless). Recommendation: Hetzner for side projects, AWS/GCP for production with compliance needs.

filler_pool.turn: Search for mechanical keyboard switches and compare Cherry MX vs Gateron vs Kailh.

state_item.title: Mechanical Switch Comparison 2026
state_item.content: Switch comparison (actuation force / travel / price per switch): Cherry MX Red (45g / 2mm / $0.35), Gateron Yellow (50g / 2mm / $0.22), Kailh Box Red (45g / 1.8mm / $0.28). Tactile: Cherry MX Brown (55g / 2mm / $0.35), Gateron Brown (55g / 2mm / $0.22), Kailh Box Brown (60g / 1.8mm / $0.28). Winner for feel: Gateron. Winner for durability: Cherry. Best value: Gateron Yellow.

filler_pool.turn: Search for the best VPN services and compare their privacy policies.

state_item.title: VPN Comparison 2026 - Privacy Focused
state_item.content: VPN privacy audit results: 1) Mullvad - no logs verified by audit, accepts cash, $5.50/mo. 2) ProtonVPN - Swiss jurisdiction, open source, free tier available. 3) IVPN - WireGuard support, multi-hop, $6/mo. 4) ExpressVPN - fast but now owned by Kape Technologies. 5) NordVPN - large server network, passed audit. Red flags: any VPN requiring personal info to sign up, free VPNs with ad tracking, VPNs based in 14 Eyes countries.

filler_pool.turn: Search for ergonomic office chairs and compare Herman Miller, Steelcase, and Secretlab.

state_item.title: Office Chair Showdown 2026
state_item.content: After 6 months of daily testing: Herman Miller Aeron ($1,395) - best for warm climates (mesh), 12-year warranty, tilt mechanism is industry-best. Steelcase Leap V3 ($1,249) - best for long sessions, LiveBack technology adapts to spine. Secretlab Titan Evo 2026 ($519) - best value, improved lumbar. For PhD students on a budget: IKEA Markus ($229) is surprisingly good for the price.

filler_pool.turn: Search for e-readers and compare Kindle, Kobo, and Boox devices.

state_item.title: E-Reader Comparison 2026
state_item.content: Display comparison: Kindle Paperwhite 6 (7", 350ppi, warm light, $149), Kobo Clara 2E (6", 300ppi, ComfortLight, $139), Boox Page (7", 300ppi, Android OS, $249). Battery life: Kindle 12 weeks, Kobo 10 weeks, Boox 4 weeks. Key difference: Boox runs Android apps (Libby, Google Books), Kobo supports library borrowing natively, Kindle has the largest ebook store.

filler_pool.turn: Search for home espresso machines under $1000 and compare the semi-automatic options.

state_item.title: Best Espresso Machines Under $1000 (2026)
state_item.content: Top semi-automatic machines: 1) Breville Barista Express Plus ($699) - built-in grinder, great for beginners. 2) Gaggia Classic Pro 2026 ($449) - best upgradability, OPV mod-friendly. 3) Rancilio Silvia V7 ($849) - commercial group head, steam power. 4) Lelit Anna PL41TEM ($549) - PID temperature control, compact. Winner for first machine: Breville. Winner for espresso purists: Gaggia or Rancilio.

filler_pool.turn: Search for 4K monitors for photo editing and compare color accuracy across brands.

state_item.title: Best 4K Monitors for Photo Editing 2026
state_item.content: Color accuracy tested with i1Display Pro: 1) ASUS ProArt PA32UCR ($1,299) - Delta E < 1, 98% DCI-P3, hardware calibration. 2) BenQ SW272U ($1,099) - 99% AdobeRGB, uniformity compensator. 3) Dell UltraSharp U2723QE ($619) - best value, IPS Black, 98% DCI-P3. 4) LG UltraFine 32UQ85R ($799) - USB-C 96W, great for laptops. 5) Eizo ColorEdge CS2740 ($1,549) - 10-year warranty, best factory calibration.

filler_pool.turn: Search for robot vacuum cleaners and compare obstacle avoidance capabilities.

state_item.title: Robot Vacuum Obstacle Avoidance Test 2026
state_item.content: Tested with 20 common household objects: 1) Roborock S9 MaxV (19/20 avoided, LiDAR + dual cameras). 2) Dreame X40 Ultra (18/20, 3D structured light). 3) Ecovacs Deebot X5 (17/20, AI recognition). 4) iRobot Roomba j9+ (16/20, PrecisionVision). 5) Narwal Freo X Ultra (15/20, RGB camera). Biggest failure: all vacuums struggled with clear glass objects and very thin cables under 2mm.

filler_pool.turn: Search for portable power stations and compare watt-hour capacity vs weight for camping.

state_item.title: Portable Power Station Comparison 2026
state_item.content: Capacity-to-weight ratio comparison: 1) EcoFlow Delta 2 Max (2048Wh, 23kg, 89Wh/kg). 2) Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus (2042Wh, 27.9kg, 73Wh/kg). 3) Bluetti AC200L (2048Wh, 28.6kg, 72Wh/kg). 4) Anker Solix F2600 (2560Wh, 31.9kg, 80Wh/kg). 5) Goal Zero Yeti 1500X (1516Wh, 20.8kg, 73Wh/kg). Best for car camping: EcoFlow Delta 2 Max. Best for backpacking: Jackery 300 Plus (288Wh, 3.75kg).

filler_pool.turn: Search for mesh Wi-Fi systems and compare coverage for a 3000 sq ft home.

state_item.title: Mesh Wi-Fi System Comparison 2026
state_item.content: Tested in 3000 sq ft, 3-story home: 1) TP-Link Deco BE85 (WiFi 7, 19Gbps, $699/3-pack) - fastest, best range. 2) Eero Pro 6E ($499/3-pack) - easiest setup, great parental controls. 3) ASUS ZenWiFi BQ16 Pro ($849/2-pack) - WiFi 7, dedicated backhaul. 4) Netgear Orbi 970 ($1,699/3-pack) - premium, 10Gbps ports. 5) Google Nest WiFi Pro ($399/3-pack) - best value. Dead zone elimination: all scored 95%+ except Google at 89%.

filler_pool.turn: Search for electric bikes under $2000 and compare range per charge.

state_item.title: Best Commuter E-Bikes Under $2000 (2026)
state_item.content: Real-world range test (pedal assist level 3, 180lb rider, flat terrain): 1) Lectric XP 3.0 ($999) - 62 miles, folding. 2) RadPower RadCity 6 ($1,699) - 55 miles, integrated lights. 3) Aventon Soltera 2 ($1,299) - 48 miles, lightest at 36lbs. 4) Trek FX+ 2 ($1,899) - 45 miles, best components. 5) Ride1Up Prodigy V2 ($1,595) - 50 miles, mid-drive motor. Winner for commuting: RadCity 6. Winner for multi-modal: Lectric XP 3.0 (folds for train).

filler_pool.turn: Search for noise-canceling earbuds and compare them for working out at the gym.

state_item.title: Best Workout Earbuds 2026
state_item.content: Tested during 100+ hours of gym and running: 1) Jabra Elite 10 Gen 2 (IP68, best fit stability, $249). 2) Beats Fit Pro 2 (wingtips, Apple spatial audio, $199). 3) Sony WF-1000XM6 (best ANC, but average fit for running, $279). 4) Samsung Galaxy Buds3 Pro (IP57, great Android integration, $229). 5) Bose Ultra Open (open-ear, no isolation, $299). For heavy sweaters: Jabra or Beats. For audiophile gym-goers: Sony.

filler_pool.turn: Search for smart home hubs and compare Matter protocol support across ecosystems.

state_item.title: Smart Home Hub Matter Compatibility 2026
state_item.content: Matter device support tested: 1) Apple HomePod (98% Matter compliance, Thread border router, $299). 2) Amazon Echo Hub ($179) - 95% Matter, widest Alexa ecosystem. 3) Google Nest Hub Max ($229) - 93% Matter, best routines. 4) Samsung SmartThings Station ($59) - 91% Matter, best value. 5) Home Assistant Yellow ($149) - 99% Matter, fully local, most flexible. Cross-platform note: Matter lets devices work across all ecosystems simultaneously.

filler_pool.turn: Search for ultrawide monitors and compare curved vs flat for productivity.

state_item.title: Curved vs Flat Ultrawide Monitors 2026
state_item.content: Tested with developers, traders, and writers: 1) LG 40WP95C (5K2K, 39.7", curved 2300R, Thunderbolt 4, $1,699) - best for coding with 3 panels. 2) Dell U3425WE (34", flat, IPS Black, $749) - best flat ultrawide value. 3) Samsung Odyssey OLED G9 (49", 1800R, $1,299) - replaces dual monitors. 4) ASUS ProArt PA348CGV (34", flat, Calman verified, $729) - best for design. Verdict: curved reduces eye strain at 34"+, flat preferred for color-critical work.

filler_pool.turn: Search for air purifiers and compare CADR ratings for large living rooms.

state_item.title: Best Air Purifiers for Large Rooms 2026
state_item.content: CADR (smoke/dust/pollen) for rooms 500+ sq ft: 1) Blueair Blue Max 3350i (CADR 350/370/390, $449, smart sensors). 2) Coway Airmega 400S (CADR 340/350/380, $549, dual HEPA filters). 3) Dyson Big Quiet Formaldehyde (CADR 320/350/360, $799, catalytic oxidation). 4) Levoit Core 600S (CADR 410/430/450, $299, best value). 5) Molekule Air Pro (PECO tech, no CADR rating, $899, controversial claims). Winner: Levoit for value, Blueair for smart features.

filler_pool.turn: Search for external SSDs and compare transfer speeds for video editing workflows.

state_item.title: External SSDs for Video Editing 2026
state_item.content: Sequential read/write speeds tested with 4K ProRes 422 HQ timeline: 1) Samsung T9 (USB 3.2 Gen 2x2, 2000/1950 MB/s, $179/2TB). 2) SanDisk Extreme Pro V2 (USB 3.2 Gen 2x2, 2000/2000 MB/s, $189/2TB). 3) LaCie Rugged SSD Pro (Thunderbolt 3, 2800/2700 MB/s, $299/2TB). 4) OWC Envoy Pro FX (TB3/USB-C, 2800/2600 MB/s, $279/2TB). 5) Crucial X10 Pro (USB 3.2 Gen 2, 1050/1000 MB/s, $109/2TB). For 8K editing: Thunderbolt drives required.

filler_pool.turn: Search for webcams for video conferencing and compare image quality in low-light conditions.

state_item.title: Best Webcams for Low-Light Video Calls 2026
state_item.content: Low-light performance tested at 50 lux (dim office): 1) Logitech Brio 500 (1080p60, auto light correction, $129). 2) Elgato Facecam Pro (4K30, Sony STARVIS sensor, $299). 3) Insta360 Link 2 (4K, AI tracking, gimbal mount, $199). 4) Opal Tadpole (1080p, MacBook mount, $149). 5) Anker PowerConf C200 (2K, privacy shutter, $59). Winner for most users: Logitech Brio 500. Winner for streamers: Elgato Facecam Pro.
